scope: B9.GOV governance-status TRACKER (development-only; sanitized metadata ONLY; NO PII). Tracks the institutional-governance state of the B9 prospective randomized-audit acquisition + pins the frozen protocol artifacts. Does NOT grant approval, is NOT the submission, is NOT legal/IRB advice.

state_machine.gate: real human-EEG recording MUST NOT begin unless current_status == 'approved'

status_log.note: B9.3 acquisition-readiness lock complete; external governance submission not yet started

frozen_protocol_artifacts_sha256_16.note: the CSV file sha256 (cc9b5780) and the composition table_hash (e3675b16) are DISTINCT legitimate hashes of the same table

protocol_change_trigger: if the governance review requests modifications affecting assignment, trial/microblock structure, exclusions, or recorded data fields, those changes MUST trigger (1) a protocol DIFF vs these pinned hashes and (2) a design red-team, BEFORE any acquisition begins. A protocol change re-pins these hashes and appends a status_log entry.
repo_hygiene_rules: the repository MUST NOT contain: private participant information / PII; signed consent forms; reviewer identities; institution-private correspondence; raw human EEG
the repository holds ONLY: sanitized status metadata, version/artifact hashes, the pre-registration + code + synthetic/dry-run artifacts
any identity<->slot linkage is held separately under institutional access control, NEVER committed
authorized_now: external governance submission process (adapt the draft packet to the institution's template + submit through the governance channel)
authorized_only_after_approved: B9.4 6-10 subject operations-only checkpoint (logistics only; scientific endpoints structurally blinded)
